headline: RBC Deploys TIFIN AG Behavioural AI Across 2,100 Advisors
the_so_what: TIFIN AG's behavioural model — trained on billions of transactions to detect money-in-motion signals — gives RBC's 2,100 advisors a client acquisition capability that Morgan Stanley and JPMorgan are building internally. The distinction is the data source: Morgan Stanley's AI works from CRM and meeting notes; TIFIN AG works from actual transaction flows. For firms without the engineering resources to build behavioural models, TIFIN AG's partnership model offers a shortcut.
summary: RBC Wealth Management completed a company-wide rollout of TIFIN AG's AI-Powered Insights to all 2,100+ US advisors in February 2024, following a 60-advisor pilot launched in August 2023. The system uses TIFIN AG's ATOM behavioural model — trained on billions of client transactions — to identify clients most likely to consolidate outside assets due to life events, demographics, and portfolio behaviour. Insights are delivered directly into advisors' Salesforce desktops. TIFIN AG, which spun off from parent TIFIN in January 2024, cited the rollout as validation that AI-driven client intelligence is becoming standard practice in wealth management. Three or more additional AI applications are in development on the platform.

key_stat.label: RBC Wealth Management US advisors using AI to detect money-in-motion client opportunities

verified_claims: Company-wide rollout to all RBC Wealth Management-US advisors as of February 28, 2024 (PR Newswire official press release)
TIFIN AG spun off from parent TIFIN in January 2024 (press release)
Uses behavioural AI trained on client transaction data to identify money-in-motion clients (press release)
Integrated into advisor Salesforce desktops (press release)
3+ additional AI applications in development (press release)
unverified_claims: 2,100+ advisor figure sourced from landscape assessment; press release states 'all RBC Wealth Management-US advisors' without specifying exact count
_governance.notes: Core facts verified against PR Newswire press release dated February 28, 2024. Advisor count of 2,100+ drawn from landscape data consistent with RBC WM-US advisor network size. human_approved: Track 2 entry written directly from verified landscape source.
